name: Krista Garcia
role: Husband's Brazilian 40th Birthday · Aug 15, 2026 · 75 guests · Pelham NH backyard

handling.tone: Polite-delay comparison-shopping. She said 'I will reach out when I am ready.' Honor that. Patience over pressure. Authenticity differentiation is the win.
handling.voice_adjustments: Andre voice: respectful, peer, references specific call details (Supreme Churrasco, picanha, chicken hearts confirmed off-menu). Husband-Brazilian emotional anchor.
handling.context: Quote sent $2,433.78 — Supreme Churrasco + Self-Serve Attended Buffet (food + bar) for 75 guests. Discovery call Apr 15 was 21 min, very productive. Husband Brazilian — full churrasco experience is the cultural anchor. Apr 24 polite-delay reply: 'still obtaining quotes.' Apr 24 tasting pivot offered (May 3).

context_anchors: Husband's Brazilian 40th — cultural celebration, churrasco core
Pelham NH 03076, just over MA-NH border, 30 mi from us
Backyard with pool, no outside sink, hose for water
Apr 24 polite-delay 'still obtaining quotes' — patience window

lead.last_activity: 2026-04-24 — Krista replied 'still obtaining quotes' + Andre offered May 3 tasting
lead.next_move: One thoughtful re-engagement reframing comparison correctly + tasting May 3 pitch

enrichment.identity_notes: Surname Garcia is Hispanic, but husband is BRAZILIAN per discovery call. Either Krista is Hispanic married to Brazilian, or surname from marriage. 978 area code suggests pre-NH MA roots. Backyard pool, no outside sink — André captured logistics specs.
win_angles: Husband's Brazilian heritage = our home court, lean hard on authenticity
21-min discovery call established trust — reference specific things she said
Quote SHARP at $2,433 ($32/pp) for 75 with churrasco + bar
Husband-focused emotional anchor — make HIS 40th feel like home
Polite-delay = patience window, don't push hard
nepq_openers: Continuation: 'Hey Krista — saw your note about weighing options. Totally fair. One thing while you compare: $2,433.78 is full churrasco service with team grilling live + bar setup + attended buffet — all-in, no setup fees. Cheaper quotes = ask what's included so you compare apples-to-apples.'
Frame: 'For your husband's 40th, what matters more in comparison — total price, what feels most authentic, or which caterer you trust most to actually pull it off?'
Anchor: 'If $2,433 is over target, easiest trim is dropping bar to beer/wine only — saves $X. Or attendant-only without churrasqueiro grilling — saves $Y. But live grilling makes it feel Brazilian.'
open_gaps: How many other quotes she's collecting
Guest list culturally — Brazilian heavy, Hispanic mix, American friends?
Whether she'd come to May 17 tasting
enrichment.strategic_note: Lives or dies on AUTHENTICITY differentiation. Other caterers will quote churrasco lower because they're approximating it. Comeketo IS what Krista's husband and family are looking for. One sharp message respecting her process, reframing comparison correctly, reminding her of discovery-call warmth. Then patience. 75% close confidence with quote out — 'don't fumble it' deal.

comms.summary: 21-min discovery — full event vision, Supreme Churrasco menu locked
Quote sent: $2,433.78 food + bar, Loom walkthrough
'Still obtaining quotes and weighing options. Will reach out.'
May 3 tasting offered — 'eat our food, see services, talk budget'

notes: Authenticity is the moat — Brazilian-led catering vs 'we do BBQ' caterers
If silent past May 5, one final value-add then phone call
